name: maps-view
summary: Map screen with markers + a key-free 'nearby' query (bounding-box + haversine sort) over any table with lat/lng columns.
postInstall: npx expo install react-native-maps  (needs a dev build; Apple Maps on iOS / Google Maps on Android by default)
No API key on iOS (Apple Maps). Android uses Google Maps — add a Maps SDK key in app.config.ts only when you ship a standalone Android build.
Point fetchNearby() at your own table that has numeric lat/lng columns (no PostGIS needed).
Pairs with places-search (pick a place) and nav-turn-by-turn (route to it).
Replace src/features/map/ui/map-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
